title: FREE Spanish-Speaking Caregiver Support Group for Caregivers of Children 0-8 years old (includes prenatal)
heroImageAlt: Grupo Gratis de Apoyo Para Cuidadores en Español

blocks.title: FREE Spanish-Speaking Caregiver Support Group for Caregivers of Children 0-8 years old (includes prenatal)
blocks.logistics:
When: Tuesdays, 7-9pm on Zoom

Dates: April 7, 14, 21, 28 and May 5, 12

Price: Free

Where: Zoom

Link will be sent after registering
blocks.imageAlt: FREE Spanish-Speaking Caregiver Support Group for Caregivers of Children 0-8 years old (includes prenatal)

blocks.heading: Group will be conducted in Spanish with a bilingual therapist

cards.title: Parenting support and practical guidance for new and expecting caregivers
Caregiver stress, anxiety, sadness, and overwhelm
Understanding young children’s emotional and behavioral development
Communication and connection between caregivers and children
Managing tantrums, big feelings, and challenging behaviors
Healthy routines, coping skills, and emotional regulation at home
Screen time, tablets, cell phones and setting technology boundaries
Helping children stay engaged in play and daily routines when less reliance on internet based distractions
Building support and connection with other caregivers.

blocks.heading: Group will be facilitated by GROWTH JOURNEY bilingual therapist
blocks.body:
Open to all Spanish-speaking NSC clients who are caregivers of children 0-8 years old
All immigration statuses are welcome!

Register by emailing Gwen Soffer at gsoffer@nscphila.org

excerpt: A free, welcoming support group for Spanish-speaking caregivers of young children — from pregnancy through age 8 — facilitated by a bilingual Growth Journey therapist.
seoDescription: A free Spanish-speaking caregiver support group for parents of children 0-8 (including prenatal), led by a bilingual therapist on Zoom. All immigration statuses welcome.
